output: Seed written. Sub-dim focus: **cross-turn forget** — engineer's Turn-2 phrasing ("confirm", "current state", "paste into incident channel") creates a tempting re-poll cue, but both requested facts (version 2.4.1, 6/6 replicas) are verbatim in the Turn-1 envelope still in context. Discrimination axis is tool-call count on Turn 2 (0 vs 1-2).
